title: Personas Configuration
description: Schema for personas.yaml — both the built-in resources/personas.yaml and filesystem overrides in ~/etc/kokos/libs/<lib>/MCP_TOOLS/personas.yaml. File paths are resolved relative to the directory containing the personas.yaml file.

personas.description: Map of persona ID to persona definition. The key is the persona ID used at runtime (e.g. "default", "technical-assistant").

title.description: Human-readable name shown in the UI.

description.description: Optional short description of the persona's purpose and specialization.

file.description: Path to the Markdown file containing the persona's system prompt. Resolved relative to the directory of the personas.yaml file.
